scripts.test:all: npm run test:auth && npm run test:knowledge-base && npm run test:flow-designer && npm run test:flow-tester && npm run test:profile && npm run test:organization && npm run test:settings && npm run test:logs
scripts.test:auth: npx playwright test tests/auth/login.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/auth/logout.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/auth/forgot-password.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:knowledge-base: npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/create-kb-bucket-gcs.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/create-kb-bucket-website-crawler.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/schedule-kb-incremental-sync-advanced.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/schedule-kb-full-sync-simple.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/edit-kb-schedule.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/knowledge-base/delete-kb.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:flow-designer: npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-user-utterance-node.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-custom-node.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-model-node-parser.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-model-node-without-parser.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-knowledge-base-node.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-designer/create-new-flow-knowledge-base-web-crawler.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:flow-tester: npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-user-utterance-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-custom-node-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-model-node-parser-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-model-node-without-parser-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-kb-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/flow-tester/test-kb-web-crawler-flow.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:profile: npx playwright test tests/profile/update-profile-name.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/profile/change-password.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/profile/change-email.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:organization: npx playwright test tests/organization/invite-member-access.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/invite-existing-user.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/change-role-admin-to-developer.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/change-role-developer-to-agent.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/change-role-agent-to-admin.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/deactivate-member-access-control.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/activate-member-access-restored.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/switch-organization.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/upload-organization-logo.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/upload-bot-icon.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/admin-role-sidebar-permissions.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/developer-role-sidebar-permissions.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/organization/agent-role-sidebar-permissions.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:settings: npx playwright test tests/settings/view-api-keys-settings.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/settings/create-api-key-internal.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/settings/create-api-key-external.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/settings/edit-api-key-description.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/settings/reactivate-api-key.spec.ts --reporter=line && npx playwright test tests/settings/revoke-api-key.spec.ts --reporter=line
